title: Lomelosia austroaltaica
intro: Lomelosia austroaltaica, also known as the Autumn Lomelosia or Alpine Lomelosia, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Lomelosia austroaltaica include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments to treat skin conditions.
